base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of gun_turret_ground — a effect_layer from 1987 contra. Ground-mounted mini-turret — appears in base-interiors, fires one direction. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
